testcase.name: test_resolve_cap_exceeded_returns_within_cap
testcase.failure: Cap-exceeded must still return a non-null best candidate from within the iteration window.
Resolved target must be one of the first 4 stubs (cap=4); 5th stub beyond cap.

testcase.name: test_resolve_cap_one_returns_a_stub
testcase.failure: Cap=1 must still return a non-null target.
Cap=1 should resolve to the geometrically-first hit (nearer stub).

testcase.name: test_resolve_within_cap_returns_priority_winner
testcase.failure: Within-cap mixed priorities → Document (0) wins over Door (3) and Pickup (2).
